## Summary

Describe the problem and the implemented solution.

## Tracking

- Issue:
- Roadmap feature ID:

## Validation

List the automated and manual checks performed, including failure-path tests where applicable.

## Privacy and compatibility

Describe the effect on transient data, persisted data, diagnostics, reports, event/configuration compatibility, permissions, and network behavior.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read and followed `AGENTS.md` and the relevant specifications.
- [ ] Tests cover the acceptance criteria and applicable failure paths.
- [ ] Privacy canaries or equivalent checks cover external or persisted values.
- [ ] Documentation and roadmap status are updated where applicable.
- [ ] NuGet versions, if any, are managed through Central Package Management and licenses were reviewed.
- [ ] `dotnet format FocusLedger.slnx --no-restore --verify-no-changes` passes.
- [ ] Release build and NUnit tests pass without warnings.
- [ ] Changed text files use CRLF line endings.
- [ ] The change introduces no application telemetry, update check, remote configuration, or other network communication.
